name: zol
description: ZOL (@zolbot, FID 3338501) - the ZAO's music scout on Farcaster. Runs on a Raspberry Pi, cron-driven, human-gated posting.

scripts.check: for f in scripts/*.js src/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'all scripts OK'
scripts.v2:test: node --test src/__tests__/capsule-registry.test.js src/__tests__/dreamloop-registry.test.js src/__tests__/receipt-journal.test.js src/__tests__/memory-weaver.test.js src/__tests__/work-router.test.js src/__tests__/model-gateway.test.js src/__tests__/tool-gateway.test.js src/__tests__/artifact-pipeline.test.js src/__tests__/proof-drop-adapter.test.js src/__tests__/toolgym-adapter.test.js src/__tests__/zictionary.test.js src/__tests__/zocuments.test.js src/__tests__/zikipedia.test.js src/__tests__/approval-bridge.test.js src/__tests__/v2-integration.test.js
scripts.v2:check: node --check src/capsule-registry.js src/dreamloop-registry.js src/memory-weaver.js src/model-gateway.js src/receipt-journal.js src/tool-gateway.js src/work-router.js src/artifact-pipeline.js src/agent-gateway.js src/adapters/proof-drop-adapter.js src/adapters/toolgym-adapter.js src/zictionary.js src/zocuments.js src/zikipedia.js src/approval-bridge.js
